steps.title: Identify the example-support pattern
steps.content: The passage states a general principle (sleek vehicles are more aerodynamic), then illustrates it with a specific contrast: the Cessna 310 jet (sleek) versus a semitruck (bulky). The blank must signal that this Cessna example demonstrates the principle.

steps.title: Match the exemplifying word
steps.content:
”For example,” introduces the streamlined nose as a concrete example of the general principle about sleek vehicles, which is the passage's exact pattern: general claim followed by specific examples.

The other three options either signal contradiction, listing, or simultaneous action rather than exemplification.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
